## Public-safe checklist

- [ ] No forms or text inputs on public demo pages
- [ ] No uploads or public data intake
- [ ] No cookies, analytics, tracking pixels, or third-party external scripts
- [ ] No wallets, token approvals, network switching, transaction broadcast, custody, escrow release, payment, token sale, or value movement
- [ ] No external AI calls
- [ ] No personal, customer, confidential, regulated, or secret data committed

## Version references checked

- [ ] README does not stop at v29/v30
- [ ] Demo hub covers v22-v35
- [ ] Homepage points to v35 and the command center
- [ ] Docs/manifests include latest v35 routes

## Claim-boundary checklist

- [ ] No achieved AGI/ASI claim
- [ ] No production RSI claim
- [ ] No autonomous deployment authority claim
- [ ] No live Mainnet settlement/custody/staking/token sale claim
- [ ] No legal, financial, tax, investment, or guaranteed ROI claim
